title: Convert Bank Statements to Spreadsheets | AI Statement Parser
metaTitle: Convert Bank Statements to Excel Spreadsheets | PDF Excel AI
metaDescription: Convert PDF bank statements to Excel spreadsheets with AI. Extract transactions, dates, amounts automatically. 99%+ accuracy on clear documents.
h1: Convert Bank Statements to Excel Spreadsheets

hero.headline: Turn Bank Statements Into Structured Spreadsheets
hero.subheadline: AI-powered extraction of transactions, dates, amounts, and descriptions from PDF bank statements into Excel format

summary: Converting bank statements from PDF format to spreadsheets eliminates manual data entry and enables better financial analysis. Our AI extracts transaction details, dates, amounts, and descriptions from digital or scanned statements into structured Excel files.
whenThisIsRelevant: Preparing financial reports from multiple bank accounts
Converting legacy PDF statements for analysis
supportedInputs: Scanned paper statements as PDF or images
expectedOutputs: Excel files with transaction data in columns
CSV format for importing into accounting software
commonChallenges: Manual typing of hundreds of transaction entries
Time-consuming data entry for multi-page statements
Errors from manual transcription of amounts and dates
howItWorksSteps: Upload your PDF bank statement or statement image
AI identifies and extracts transaction data fields
Review extracted data and customize field selection
Download structured Excel or CSV file
whyPdfExcelAiFits: Handles both digital PDFs and scanned statement images
Extracts standard fields like date, description, debit, credit, balance
Batch processing for multiple months of statements
OCR technology reads scanned or photographed statements
limitations: Accuracy depends on statement print quality and clarity
Non-standard bank statement formats may require field customization
Heavily redacted statements may have incomplete data extraction

faq.question: Can I convert scanned bank statements to Excel?
faq.answer: Yes, our OCR technology can extract data from scanned PDF statements and even photos of paper statements, though accuracy depends on image clarity.

faq.question: What bank statement formats are supported?
faq.answer: We support most standard bank statement layouts in PDF format, including digital statements and scanned copies from major banks.

faq.question: How accurate is the transaction data extraction?
faq.answer: We achieve 99%+ accuracy on clear, standard bank statements. Complex layouts or poor quality scans may require manual review of extracted data.

faq.question: Can I process multiple months of statements at once?
faq.answer: Yes, our batch processing feature lets you upload and convert multiple statement files simultaneously, saving significant time on large datasets.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and automatically deleted after processing
99%+ accuracy on clear bank statement documents
Free trial available with pay-as-you-go pricing
exampleUseCases: Converting quarterly statements for tax preparation
Digitizing paper statements for accounting software import
Creating expense reports from business account statements
Building financial dashboards from multi-bank statement data
